title: Immersive:Tooltip
description: Provides more information about tools (and armor) in their tooltips
body:
This mod will modify item tooltip in the game.Its look like are as follows
## Features
- Make tooltip look better
- Armor model viewer
- Show item rarity
- Display tooltip paging 
- Display food item effect 
---
